glosses.ja: すり減らす; 使い果たす

sentences.target: Ces marches usent mes vieilles chaussures.

translations.fr: Ces marches usent mes vieilles chaussures.
translations.en: These stairs wear out my old shoes.
translations.es: Estas escaleras desgastan mis zapatos viejos.
translations.de: Diese Stufen nutzen meine alten Schuhe ab.
translations.it: Queste scale consumano le mie vecchie scarpe.
translations.ko: 이 계단은 내 낡은 신발을 닳게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些楼梯把我的旧鞋磨损得很厉害。
translations.yue: 呢啲樓梯會磨殘我啲舊鞋。
translations.ru: Эти ступени изнашивают мои старые ботинки.
translations.pt: Estas escadas desgastam meus sapatos velhos.
translations.he: המדרגות האלה שוחקות את הנעליים הישנות שלי.
translations.vi: Những bậc cầu thang này làm mòn đôi giày cũ của tôi.
translations.nl: Deze trappen slijten mijn oude schoenen.
translations.uk: Ці сходи зношують мої старі черевики.
translations.hu: Ezek a lépcsők elkoptatják a régi cipőimet.
translations.hi: ये सीढ़ियाँ मेरे पुराने जूते घिस देती हैं.
translations.pl: Te schody zużywają moje stare buty.
translations.el: Αυτά τα σκαλιά φθείρουν τα παλιά μου παπούτσια.
translations.nb: Disse trappene sliter ut de gamle skoene mine.
translations.id: Tangga ini membuat sepatu lamaku cepat rusak.
translations.sv: De här trapporna sliter ut mina gamla skor.
translations.ro: Aceste scări îmi tocesc pantofii vechi.
translations.cs: Tyhle schody opotřebovávají moje staré boty.
translations.da: Disse trapper slider mine gamle sko op.
translations.ja: この階段は私の古い靴をすり減らす。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies the noun 'marches'.
Common noun, feminine plural; subject of the verb 'usent'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; predicates what the subject does.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies 'chaussures'.
Adjective, feminine plural; agrees with and modifies 'chaussures'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'usent'.

translations.vi: Cái này làm người ta căng thẳng.
translations.hi: यह बहुत परेशान कर देता है.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial); subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, plural; determines 'nerfs'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'use'.

translations.en: Gotta avoid wearing out the battery.
translations.es: Hay que evitar agotar la batería.
translations.de: Man sollte vermeiden, den Akku zu strapazieren.
translations.it: Bisogna evitare di scaricare la batteria.
translations.ko: 배터리를 닳게 하지 않도록 해야 해요.
translations.pt: É preciso evitar esgotar a bateria.
translations.nl: Je moet voorkomen dass de batterij leegloopt.
translations.hi: बैटरी को खत्म करने से बचना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αποφεύγουμε να αδειάζουμε την μπαταρία.
translations.nb: Vi bør unngå å tømme batteriet.
translations.sv: Man bör undvika att tömma batteriet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să evităm să descărcăm bateria.
translations.cs: Je třeba se vyhnout vybíjení baterie.
translations.da: Man bør undgå at tømme batteriet.
translations.ja: バッテリーを消耗させるのは避けたほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal verb 'falloir', present 3rd singular with omitted 'il'; expresses necessity.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'faut'.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces the infinitive 'user'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'éviter'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'batterie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'user'.

sentences.target: J'use vite ces gants au jardin.

translations.fr: J'use vite ces gants au jardin.
translations.en: I wear these gloves out quickly in the garden.
translations.es: Desgasto estos guantes rápido en el jardín.
translations.de: Ich nutze diese Handschuhe im Garten schnell ab.
translations.it: Consumo questi guanti velocemente in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在花园里很快就会把这些手套磨坏。
translations.yue: 我喺花園好快就用殘呢啲手套。
translations.ru: В саду я быстро изнашиваю эти перчатки.
translations.pt: Eu desgasto estas luvas rápido no jardim.
translations.he: אני שוחק את הכפפות האלה מהר בגינה.
translations.vi: Tôi làm mòn đôi găng tay này rất nhanh ở vườn.
translations.ar: أبلي هذه القفازات بسرعة في الحديقة.
translations.nl: In de tuin slijt ik deze handschoenen snel.
translations.uk: У саду я швидко зношую ці рукавички.
translations.hu: A kertben gyorsan elkoptatom ezeket a kesztyűket.
translations.hi: मैं बगीचे में इन दस्तानों को जल्दी घिस देता हूँ.
translations.pl: W ogrodzie szybko zużywam te rękawice.
translations.el: Στον κήπο φθείρω γρήγορα αυτά τα γάντια.
translations.nb: I hagen sliter jeg raskt ut disse hanskene.
translations.id: Di kebun aku cepat menghabiskan sarung tangan ini.
translations.sv: I trädgården sliter jag snabbt ut dessa handskar.
translations.ro: În grădină toc repede aceste mănuși.
translations.cs: Na zahradě rychle opotřebuji tyhle rukavice.
translations.da: I haven slider jeg hurtigt disse handsker op.
translations.fi: Puutarhassa kulutan nämä hanskat nopeasti loppuun.
translations.ja: 庭でこの手袋をすぐに擦り切ってしまう。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'use'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'gants'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'use'.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (via 'au'), indicating location.
